summary.text: The cellular phone arrives in perfect condition and feels practically brand new. Customers describe it as a quality product with very good performance. The battery health remains at 100% with zero cycles, indicating excellent battery life. Users are satisfied with the phone's appearance. However, customers have mixed opinions regarding the phone's scratch-resistant properties and overall functionality.

authors_reviews.title: Excellent for the price
authors_reviews.text: The cell phone is very good, it has a 100% battery and is like new. The only thing is that it has a slight streak on the screen. But for the value, it is in excellent condition.
authors_reviews.author: CAMILO

authors_reviews.title: phone inb the most perfect condition. but came with no charger
authors_reviews.text: phone was just as god as new no exaggeration, even had 100% battery health
authors_reviews.author: mobi litt

authors_reviews.title: Excellent quality, as advertised
authors_reviews.text: This is the first time I buy a refurbished/renewed phone (usually bought them from apple before), so I was a bit concerned what I would be getting.Phone looks brand new. I could not find a single scratch under tight scrutiny, and I looked thoroughly.Battery life at 100% with 1 charge cycle. Everything has been tested and is working great.Very satisfied with this seller!
authors_reviews.author: M

authors_reviews.title: Great quality
authors_reviews.text: Very happy with the phone. Excellent condition seems to mean a very slight shallow scratch on the screen < 1cm that you Really have to look for. I have no complaints of the quality of the phone.
authors_reviews.author: G.S.

authors_reviews.title: Disappointing
authors_reviews.text: I ordered an iPhone 16 Pro 256 GB and it was extremely disappointing. The camera was blurry and slow. Although it was advertised as being in excellent condition, I noticed several scratches and even dents. It arrived with over 300 charge cycles and a battery health of 92 percent. Overall, the device was unacceptable, and I had to return it. I do not recommend this seller. I wouldn’t even give a star but I have to.
authors_reviews.author: 𝑨𝒓𝒊𝒆

authors_reviews.title: 16 pro natural titanium
authors_reviews.text: Phone came fast, battery health is at 96% with 313 charge cycles. Has very minimal and light scratches on the front display. My only complain is that no original box nor original charger and I ordered a dual sim and got a eSIM 😑
authors_reviews.author: Nazmi

authors_reviews.title: Exactly as described.
authors_reviews.text: iPhone 16 Pro, 1TB. Came in perfect condition, small minor scratch on the side, 96% battery life. Satisfied, thank you.
authors_reviews.author: Ryan
